description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house set within a landscaped property that includes a large tennis court, several palm trees, and a cylindrical water tank. The house features clean, angular lines with a flat roof and extensive use of glass for windows and doors, creating a bright and open appearance. The main building is surrounded by manicured lawns and paved areas, with a driveway leading up to the entrance. The tennis court is positioned adjacent to the house, separated by a patch of green grass. The property is dotted with a mix of palm and deciduous trees, providing a sense of privacy and greenery. The overall design emphasizes contemporary architecture with functional outdoor amenities.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large windows, surrounded by landscaped lawns, a tennis court, and palm trees. The property features clean lines, open spaces, and a contemporary aesthetic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main house, tennis court in the foreground, and surrounding palm trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the house's entryway, water tank, and the tennis court to the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, tennis court behind, and more of the landscaped grounds.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the driveway, garage area, and tennis court to the right.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, wide glass doors, and a paved approach, no porch or columns.
